title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入多哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入多哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Togo energy regulatory and grid-connection requirements — covering ARSE (Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Énergie) licensing, CEET (Compagnie Énergie Électrique du Togo) and CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin) grid-connection expectations, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, local fire and building authority requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements via the Port of Lomé, and Togo's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines. Donor and development-finance lender technical specifications are a parallel gate for most large-scale BESS projects in Togo.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与多哥能源监管及并网要求的对照，涵盖ARSE（能源行业监管局）许可证、CEET（多哥电力公司）和CEB（贝宁-多哥电力共同体）并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防及建筑主管机关要求、经洛美港的UN 38.3运输要求、多哥220/380 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准。捐助方和开发融资机构技术规格是多哥大多数大型BESS项目的并行门槛。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與多哥能源監管及併網要求的對照，涵蓋ARSE（能源行業監管局）許可證、CEET（多哥電力公司）和CEB（貝寧-多哥電力共同體）併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防及建築主管機關要求、經洛美港的UN 38.3運輸要求、多哥220/380 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準。捐助方和開發融資機構技術規格是多哥大多數大型BESS項目的並行門檻。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ARSE licensing determination, CEET or CEB grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Togo energy sector regulations, ARSE licensing requirements, CEET and CEB grid-connection technical specifications, local fire and building authority requirements, donor or lender technical specifications, UN transport regulations, and Port of Lomé dangerous-goods rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ARSE许可证裁定、CEET或CEB并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行多哥能源行业法规、ARSE许可证要求、CEET和CEB并网技术规格、当地消防及建筑主管机关要求、捐助方或贷款方技术规格、UN运输法规及洛美港危险货物规定。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ARSE許可證裁定、CEET或CEB併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行多哥能源行業法規、ARSE許可證要求、CEET和CEB併網技術規格、當地消防及建築主管機關要求、捐助方或貸款方技術規格、UN運輸法規及洛美港危險貨物規定。

answer_first.en: Togo does not have a standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a GB or IEC mandatory conformity scheme. BESS deployment in Togo is governed primarily by ARSE energy-sector licensing, CEET and CEB grid-connection agreements, and — for the majority of large-scale projects — donor and development-finance lender technical specifications (World Bank, AfDB, ECOWAS-REREC, EU) which typically mandate IEC standards. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Togo are: (1) ARSE regulatory licensing and project authorisation — all energy storage projects above a threshold capacity require ARSE approval; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence — expected by donors, lenders, and sophisticated project owners as the international baseline; (3) IEC 62933 system-level technical evidence where referenced in lender or CEET/CEB project specifications; (4) grid voltage context — Togo operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz, nominally the same as China, but CEET and CEB have their own protection relay coordination, communication protocol, and reactive power requirements; (5) high-temperature and dust derating — Togo's climate (average 27–35 °C, harmattan dust season) requires verified thermal management and IP-rating documentation; (6) UN 38.3 transport testing and IMDG compliance for sea freight via Lomé — Togo is a coastal state and Lomé is a major regional transshipment hub. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 are the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in donor-funded or lender-reviewed project specifications.
answer_first.zh: 多哥尚无独立的强制性BESS产品安全法规，与GB或IEC强制合格评定制度相当。多哥BESS部署主要受ARSE能源行业许可、CEET和CEB并网协议管控，对大多数大型项目而言，还受捐助方和开发融资机构技术规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行、西共体-REREC、欧盟）管控，后者通常要求遵循IEC标准。中国BESS出口多哥的实际差距包括：（1）ARSE监管许可和项目授权——超过一定装机容量的所有储能项目均须获得ARSE批准；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——捐助方、贷款方和专业项目业主将其作为国际基准；（3）贷款方或CEET/CEB项目规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术证据；（4）电网电压背景——多哥运行电压为220/380 V 50 Hz，名义上与中国相同，但CEET和CEB有其自身的保护继电器协调、通信协议和无功功率要求；（5）高温和粉尘降额——多哥气候（平均27–35°C、哈马丹沙尘季节）需要经过验证的热管理和IP防护等级文件；（6）经洛美港海运的UN 38.3运输测试和IMDG合规——多哥是沿海国家，洛美是主要的地区转运枢纽。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在捐助资助或贷款方审查的项目规格中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 多哥尚無獨立的強制性BESS產品安全法規，與GB或IEC強制合格評定制度相當。多哥BESS部署主要受ARSE能源行業許可、CEET和CEB併網協議管控，對大多數大型項目而言，還受捐助方和開發融資機構技術規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、西共體-REREC、歐盟）管控，後者通常要求遵循IEC標準。中國BESS出口多哥的實際差距包括：（1）ARSE監管許可和項目授權——超過一定裝機容量的所有儲能項目均須獲得ARSE批准；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——捐助方、貸款方和專業項目業主將其作為國際基準；（3）貸款方或CEET/CEB項目規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術證據；（4）電網電壓背景——多哥運行電壓為220/380 V 50 Hz，名義上與中國相同，但CEET和CEB有其自身的保護繼電器協調、通訊協議和無功功率要求；（5）高溫和粉塵降額——多哥氣候（平均27–35°C、哈馬丹沙塵季節）需要經過驗證的熱管理和IP防護等級文件；（6）經洛美港海運的UN 38.3運輸測試和IMDG合規——多哥是沿海國家，洛美是主要的地區轉運樞紐。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在捐助資助或貸款方審查的項目規格中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
